case_title: LE-NAIN HOTEL et al VS. ABDULLAH AMEIN SALEM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LOST ORIGINAL WRITTEN AGREEMENT/LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE-NAIN HOTEL
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ABDULLAH AMEIN

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE-NAIN HOTEL NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOME, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ABDULLAH AMEIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALEM, ABDULLAH AMEIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 730 EDDY STREET, #403, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE-NAIN HOTEL NORTHERN CALIFORNIA PRESBYTERIAN HOME, INC.
WRIT OF POSSESSION RETURNED FULLY SATISFIED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LE-NAIN HOTEL SERVED OCT-24-2001, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ABDULLAH AMEIN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $133.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SALEM, ABDULLAH AMEIN
